<div class="page-contents">
    <div class="page-header lazyload" style="" data-back="https://www.siraisi.co.jp/careers/wp25/wp-content/themes/wp-shiraishi_recruit-main/images/img-page_header-recruit.jpg" data-eio-rwidth="2000" data-eio-rheight="1125">
        <h2>
            <span class="en">Recruit</span>
            <span class="ja">採用情報</span>
        </h2>
    </div>

    <div class="page-body">
        <div class="body-contents">
            <div class="body-contents-inner">
                <h3 class="page-body-title">
                    <span class="en">Personality</span>
                    <span class="ja">求める人物像</span>
                </h3>
                <div class="body-content">
                                        <div class="personality-lists">
                                                    <div class="personality-list">
                                <img src="data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAA84AAAPoAQAAAAAnm5reAAAAAnRSTlMAAHaTzTgAAACOSURBVHja7cEBDQAAAMKg909tDjegAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAC+DeCHAAFYXlzcAAAAAElFTkSuQmCC" alt="食に興味がある方" loading="lazy" data-src="https://www.siraisi.co.jp/careers/wp25/wp-content/themes/wp-shiraishi_recruit-main/images/img-page_recruit-personality1.png" decoding="async" class="lazyload" data-eio-rwidth="974" data-eio-rheight="1000"><noscript><img src="https://www.siraisi.co.jp/careers/wp25/wp-content/themes/wp-shiraishi_recruit-main/images/img-page_recruit-personality1.png" alt="食に興味がある方" loading="lazy" data-eio="l"></noscript>
                                <div class="content">
                                    <h4><span>食に興味がある方</span></h4>
                                    <div class="desc">
                                        <p>私たちは“毎日の食卓にあがるもの”を事業の対象としています。消費者の皆さまに高い関心をもって答えていけるプロフェッショナルを求めています。衣食住の中でも「食」に重きを置いている方、価値を感じる方、お待ちしております！</p>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                                                    <div class="personality-list">
                                <img src="data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAA6MAAAPoAQAAAAADghUeAAAAAnRSTlMAAHaTzTgAAACJSURBVHja7cExAQAAAMKg9U9tCj+gAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAeBrM/wABf9HmqwAAAABJRU5ErkJggg==" alt="積極的に物事に取り組める方" loading="lazy" data-src="https://www.siraisi.co.jp/careers/wp25/wp-content/themes/wp-shiraishi_recruit-main/images/img-page_recruit-personality2.png" decoding="async" class="lazyload" data-eio-rwidth="931" data-eio-rheight="1000"><noscript><img src="https://www.siraisi.co.jp/careers/wp25/wp-content/themes/wp-shiraishi_recruit-main/images/img-page_recruit-personality2.png" alt="積極的に物事に取り組める方" loading="lazy" data-eio="l"></noscript>
                                <div class="content">
                                    <h4><span>積極的に物事に取り組める方</span></h4>
                                    <div class="desc">
                                        <p>仕事に限らず、自分の周りで起こる物事に対し、能動的に動ける人が活躍できます。 より良い価値を提供するために「自分ゴト」として行動できる方を求めています。</p>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                                                    <div class="personality-list">
                                <img src="data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAA4oAAAPoAQAAAACwyj0EAAAAAnRSTlMAAHaTzTgAAACGSURBVHja7cEBDQAAAMKg909tDjegAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAeDbBRwABxx5HPQAAAABJRU5ErkJggg==" alt="人とのつながりを大事にできる方" loading="lazy" data-src="https://www.siraisi.co.jp/careers/wp25/wp-content/themes/wp-shiraishi_recruit-main/images/img-page_recruit-personality3.png" decoding="async" class="lazyload" data-eio-rwidth="906" data-eio-rheight="1000"><noscript><img src="https://www.siraisi.co.jp/careers/wp25/wp-content/themes/wp-shiraishi_recruit-main/images/img-page_recruit-personality3.png" alt="人とのつながりを大事にできる方" loading="lazy" data-eio="l"></noscript>
                                <div class="content">
                                    <h4><span>人とのつながりを大事にできる方</span></h4>
                                    <div class="desc">
                                        <p>私たちはたくさんのスタッフや、仕事をサポートしてくださる多くの取引先との繋がりを大切にしています。そんなつながりを大切に考え、協力を促し、大きな力にできる方を求めています。</p>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                                            </div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div class="body-contents-inner">
                <h3 class="page-body-title">
                    <span class="en">Benefits</span>
                    <span class="ja">福利厚生</span>
                </h3>
                <div class="body-content">
                                        <div class="benefit-lists">
                                                    <div class="benefit-list">社会保険完備</div>
                                                    <div class="benefit-list">従業員特別価格でのパンの販売</div>
                                                    <div class="benefit-list">社員食堂あり</div>
                                                    <div class="benefit-list">社員寮あり(盛岡工場のみ)</div>
                                                    <div class="benefit-list">慶弔、産前・産後・育児休暇</div>
                                            </div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div class="body-contents-inner">
                <h3 class="page-body-title">
                    <span class="en">Education</span>
                    <span class="ja">教育体制</span>
                </h3>
                <div class="body-content">
                                        <div class="education-lists">
                                                    <div class="education-list">
                                <div class="image-wrap"><img src="data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAgAAAAIAAQAAAADcA+lXAAAAAnRSTlMAAHaTzTgAAAA2SURBVHja7cEBAQAAAIIg/69uSEABAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAHwbggAAAWN1UKQAAAAASUVORK5CYII=" alt="研修制度" loading="lazy" data-src="https://www.siraisi.co.jp/careers/wp25/wp-content/themes/wp-shiraishi_recruit-main/images/icon-page_recruit-education1.png" decoding="async" class="lazyload" data-eio-rwidth="512" data-eio-rheight="512"><noscript><img src="https://www.siraisi.co.jp/careers/wp25/wp-content/themes/wp-shiraishi_recruit-main/images/icon-page_recruit-education1.png" alt="研修制度" loading="lazy" data-eio="l"></noscript></div>
                                <div class="content">
                                    <h4><span>研修制度</span></h4>
                                    <div class="desc">
                                        <p>新入社員研修、新入社員フォローアップ研修、階層別研修など</p>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                                                    <div class="education-list">
                                <div class="image-wrap"><img src="data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAgAAAAIAAQAAAADcA+lXAAAAAnRSTlMAAHaTzTgAAAA2SURBVHja7cEBAQAAAIIg/69uSEABAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAHwbggAAAWN1UKQAAAAASUVORK5CYII=" alt="自己啓発支援制度" loading="lazy" data-src="https://www.siraisi.co.jp/careers/wp25/wp-content/themes/wp-shiraishi_recruit-main/images/icon-page_recruit-education2.png" decoding="async" class="lazyload" data-eio-rwidth="512" data-eio-rheight="512"><noscript><img src="https://www.siraisi.co.jp/careers/wp25/wp-content/themes/wp-shiraishi_recruit-main/images/icon-page_recruit-education2.png" alt="自己啓発支援制度" loading="lazy" data-eio="l"></noscript></div>
                                <div class="content">
                                    <h4><span>自己啓発支援制度</span></h4>
                                    <div class="desc">
                                        <p>自分のスキルアップのための、通信教育の受講に際し、費用を会社が負担。内容はビジネススキル、業務改善、メンタル＆ストレスマネジメント、マーケティング、営業力向上、パソコン基本・応用、資格・検定（温泉ソムリエなど）多岐にわたるコースを用意しています。興味があるものを自分で選んでいただけます！</p>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                                                    <div class="education-list">
                                <div class="image-wrap"><img src="data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAgAAAAIAAQAAAADcA+lXAAAAAnRSTlMAAHaTzTgAAAA2SURBVHja7cEBAQAAAIIg/69uSEABAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAHwbggAAAWN1UKQAAAAASUVORK5CYII=" alt="メンター制度" loading="lazy" data-src="https://www.siraisi.co.jp/careers/wp25/wp-content/themes/wp-shiraishi_recruit-main/images/icon-page_recruit-education3.png" decoding="async" class="lazyload" data-eio-rwidth="512" data-eio-rheight="512"><noscript><img src="https://www.siraisi.co.jp/careers/wp25/wp-content/themes/wp-shiraishi_recruit-main/images/icon-page_recruit-education3.png" alt="メンター制度" loading="lazy" data-eio="l"></noscript></div>
                                <div class="content">
                                    <h4><span>メンター制度</span></h4>
                                    <div class="desc">
                                        <p>入社後1年間は、新入社員にリーダー社員がつくOJTリーダー制度にてフォローを行います。職場に馴染み、仕事を覚えて力を発揮していただくために、職場全体でフォローしていきます。</p>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                                            </div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div class="body-contents-inner">
                <h3 class="page-body-title">
                    <span class="en">Activity</span>
                    <span class="ja">社内活動</span>
                </h3>
                <div class="body-content">
                    <div class="activity-wrap">
                        <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="シライシパン野球部" loading="lazy" data-src="https://www.siraisi.co.jp/careers/wp25/wp-content/themes/wp-shiraishi_recruit-main/images/img-page_recruit-activity.jpg" decoding="async" class="lazyload" data-eio-rwidth="1200" data-eio-rheight="900"><noscript><img src="https://www.siraisi.co.jp/careers/wp25/wp-content/themes/wp-shiraishi_recruit-main/images/img-page_recruit-activity.jpg" alt="シライシパン野球部" loading="lazy" data-eio="l"></noscript>
                        <div class="content">
                            <h5>ボーリング大会、運動会、GOTOシアター、GOTOパークなど労働組合主催で年間様々なイベントを実施。</h5>
                            <p>2024年～野球部が発足！約20名のメンバーで活動。年に数回試合を行い、毎年4月に開催される製パン野球大会に向けて活動をしています。</p>
                        </div>
